Data protection

Privacy Policy

Accueil Formalités is committed to protecting the privacy and security of the personal data of its visitors and clients, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act.

1. Data Controller

  • Company name: Accueil Formalités
  • Address: 91 rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris
  • Email: contact@accueilformalites.fr
  • Phone: 06 71 66 12 01

2. Data Collected

We only collect data that you voluntarily provide to us:

  • Full name
  • Email address
  • Phone number (optional)
  • Subject and content of your message

No sensitive data (as defined in Article 9 of the GDPR) is collected via the contact form. Information about your administrative situation is only gathered within the scope of a contractual engagement.

3. Purposes and Legal Basis

Purpose Legal basis
Responding to contact requests Legitimate interest / contract performance
Client relationship management Contract performance
Compliance with legal obligations Legal obligation

4. Retention Periods

  • Contact requests: 3 years from the last exchange.
  • Client files: 5 years after the end of the engagement (accounting and legal obligations).
  • Connection data: 12 months (server logs).

5. Data Recipients

Your data is exclusively accessible to authorised staff of Accueil Formalités. It is never sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes. It may be shared with technical service providers (hosting, email) solely for the execution of their services and under confidentiality agreements.

6. Transfers Outside the EU

Your data is hosted within the European Union. In the event of a transfer outside the EU, we ensure that appropriate safeguards (European Commission standard contractual clauses) are in place.

7. Your Rights

Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

  • Right of access — obtain a copy of your data.
  • Right of rectification — correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Right to erasure — request deletion of your data (subject to legal obligations).
  • Right to restriction — limit processing in certain circumstances.
  • Right to portability — receive your data in a structured format.
  • Right to object — object to processing based on legitimate interest.

To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@accueilformalites.fr. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority).

8. Cookies

This website does not use advertising cookies or third-party trackers. Any functional cookies that may be set are strictly necessary for the operation of the site and do not require your consent under applicable law.

9. Security

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or disclosure: HTTPS connection, restricted data access, internal confidentiality procedures.

10. Changes

We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. The date of the latest update is shown below. We encourage you to review it regularly.

Last updated: June 2026.

Accueil Formalités

Cabinet spécialisé dans l'accompagnement administratif des étrangers en France.

"Faire de vos démarches un succès"
